description_long: This rifle features a classic design with a wooden fixed stock and handguard, paired with a matte black metal receiver and barrel. The magazine is a curved, detachable box type, typical of the AK-pattern rifles. The front sight is a post, and the rear sight is a notched tangent, both constructed from metal. The muzzle is fitted with a slotted flash hider, and the overall finish combines wood grain with matte and slightly glossy metal surfaces. The grip is ergonomically shaped and made of wood, matching the stock and handguard, while the rest of the rifle is primarily composed of steel components.
description: A classic rifle with a wooden fixed stock, curved detachable magazine, and matte black metal barrel and receiver, featuring iron sights and a slotted flash hider.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the front, showing the muzzle, front sight post, and the narrow profile of the barrel and handguard.
description_view_1: The left side view displays the full length of the rifle, highlighting the wooden stock, handguard, curved magazine, and the receiver details.
description_view_2: The rear view shows the buttstock and the alignment of the receiver, with the magazine and barrel barely visible.
description_view_3: The right side view reveals the wooden grip, stock, handguard, and the ejection port on the receiver, along with the magazine and barrel.
